channel.title: citrus - Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

channel.itunes:summary: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: Brewery Ommegang: Iron Throne, Ep. 185
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week on Beer America TV we head to the evil House Lannister, and the family that ruled Westeros at the conclusion of season two of the HBO hit series Game of Thrones! In collaboration with HBO, Brewery Ommegang created Iron Throne Blonde Ale to match the color of Lannisters’ hair . Brewed with noble […]

The post Brewery Ommegang: Iron Throne, Ep. 185 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Foothills Brewing: Hoppyum, Ep. 174
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week on Beer America TV we talk about another new beer from a brewery we were previously unfamiliar with . Hoppyum from Foothills Brewing in Winston-Salem, NC is a genuine American IPA with an emphasis on Simcoe hops. A little piney with a hint of citrus, this beer is big on the pallet with […]

The post Foothills Brewing: Hoppyum, Ep. 174 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: BridgePort Brewing Company: Summer Squeeze, Ep. 169
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
In the heat of the summer, there’s nothing like a cold beer! Even better, there’s nothing like a cold American craft beer!! This week on Beer America TV we’re talking about BridgePort Brewing’s Summer Squeeze . Brewed with Lemon grass and Yuzu, this “Bright Ale” is clean, crisp and leaves you with a bit of […]

The post BridgePort Brewing Company: Summer Squeeze, Ep. 169 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Ska Brewing: Modus Hoperandi, Ep. 124
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Hop heads rejoice, Modus Hoperandi has a beer for you! At Beer America TV, we’ve had our share of hoppy beers, some bitter, some almost sweet . I would venture to say that Ska Brewing has found a nice middle road with Modus Hoperandi! A deep orange color, this beer hits you with citrus and […]

The post Ska Brewing: Modus Hoperandi, Ep. 124 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Alaskan Brewing Company – Alaskan White, Ep. 97
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
As we continue our tasting of the Alaskan Breweries line up of beers, this week we try Alaskan White, a Belgian style witbeir. True to the style, Alaskan White is flavored with coriander, citrus, and a secret spice. Very refreshing, this beer is very easy to drink with a lower ABV of 5.3% . Once […]

The post Alaskan Brewing Company – Alaskan White, Ep. 97 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Shipyard Brewing: XXXX IPA, Ep. 95
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week we dive into another beer from Shipyard Brewing Company in Portland Maine. For all you hop heads this one is a must try and another fine example of the diversity hops can bring to a beer. Shipyard describes XXXX IPA as a non-traditional American IPA with a brilliant copper color and the classic […]

The post Shipyard Brewing: XXXX IPA, Ep. 95 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: The Bruery: Orchard White – Ep. 64
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week’s episode brings you one of the most unique beers we’ve tasted in a long time. Orchard White from The Bruery is an incredibly aromatic Belgian Style witbier that’s brewed with coriander, citrus peel and lavender that take hold of the senses and never let go . A truly remarkable drinking experience that must […]

The post The Bruery: Orchard White – Ep. 64 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.
